message:
feat(abi): nativize __ctype_b/tolower/toupper and __ctype_get_mb_cur_max, add ctype table accessor helpers

Replace dlsym(RTLD_NEXT) call-throughs for the 4 legacy __ctype_*
internal glibc table accessors with native implementations backed by
the static ctype tables already defined in ctype_abi.rs:

ctype_abi.rs:
- Add pub(crate) helper functions ctype_b_table_ptr(),
  tolower_table_ptr(), toupper_table_ptr() returning pointers into the
  static CTYPE_B_TABLE, TOLOWER_TABLE, TOUPPER_TABLE at offset 128,
  matching the glibc C/POSIX locale convention.

glibc_internal_abi.rs:
- Replace dlsym_passthrough!() macros for __ctype_b, __ctype_tolower,
  __ctype_toupper with native implementations that call the new
  ctype_abi helper functions. This eliminates runtime dlsym overhead
  and ensures deterministic behavior.
- Replace dlsym_passthrough!() for __ctype_get_mb_cur_max with a
  native implementation returning 6 (MB_CUR_MAX for UTF-8 locale),
  matching modern glibc default behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
